children.heading: General Counsel
children.label: a General Counsel
children.text: The Chairman shall appoint a General Counsel to the Commission who shall be paid at the annual rate of basic pay payable for GS–18 of the General Schedule under .section 5332 of title 5

children.heading: Staff
children.label: b Staff
children.text: The Chairman shall appoint and supervise other staff of the Commission without regard to the provisions of title 5 governing appointments in the competitive service. Such staff shall be paid without regard to the provisions of chapter 51 and subchapter III of chapter 53 of such title relating to classification and General Schedule pay rates, except that no individual so appointed may receive pay in excess of the annual rate of basic pay payable for GS–17 of the General Schedule under section 5332 of that title.

children.heading: Temporary services
children.label: c Temporary services
children.text: The Chairman may procure temporary and intermittent services under , but at rates for individuals not to exceed the daily equivalent of the maximum annual rate of basic pay payable for GS–18 of the General Schedule.section 3109(b) of title 5

children.heading: Federal agency personnel
children.label: d Federal agency personnel
children.text: Upon the request of the Chairman, the head of any Federal agency is authorized to detail any of the personnel of such agency to the Commission to assist the Commission in carrying out its duties under this chapter, unless otherwise prohibited by law.

children.heading: Administrative support services
children.label: e Administrative support services
children.text: The Secretary or Administrator of General Services shall provide to the Commission on a reimbursable basis such administrative support services as the Commission may request.
